# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object overrides copied from active-stack construction winners.
# Dataset-driven job pressure: if a planet has unemployed pops and no free jobs, build economically viable job providers instead of leaving pops idle.
# Source potential/allow/possible blocks still own prerequisites and legality.
# Source dataset: research/stellar-ai/stellar-ai-director-economic-valuation-2026-07-07.csv
# Build-plan consumer policy: research/stellar-ai/stellar-ai-director-build-plan-consumer-policy-2026-07-09.csv

# Source-local variables required by copied construction objects.
@ESC_job_count_1								= 100
@b1_biomass = 100
@b1_jobs = 200
@b1_minerals = 400
@b1_time = 360
@b1_upkeep = 2
@b2_biomass = 200
@b2_jobs = 400
@b2_minerals = 600
@b2_rare_cost = 50
@b2_rare_upkeep = 1
@b2_time = 480
@b2_upkeep = 5
@b3_biomass = 400
@b3_minerals = 800
@b3_rare_cost = 100
@b3_rare_upkeep = 2
@b3_time = 600
@b3_upkeep = 8
@b4_biomass = 800
@b4_minerals = 2000
@b4_time = 900
@b4_upkeep = 10
@building_static_jobs = 200
@building_static_jobs_high = 400
@building_static_jobs_low = 100
@buildtime_3 = 360
@buildtime_4 = 480
@buildtime_5 = 600
@buildtime_6 = 720
@nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio	= 0.1

# object = building:building_negative_mass_factory_2; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:1200.0 roi2250:8643300.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_negative_mass_factory_2 = {
	base_buildtime = 1000
	category = manufacturing
	can_build = no

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_nm_utilization_2"
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
        generator
        giga_negative_mass
	}

	potential = {
		nor = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		or = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_add = @b2_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b4_minerals
			exotic_gases = @b3_rare_cost
			rare_crystals = @b3_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b3_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 11681
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 12
	}
}

	base_buildtime = @b4_time
	category = manufacturing

	upgrades = {
		building_negative_mass_factory_2
	}

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_nm_utilization_1"
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
        generator
		giga_negative_mass
	}

	potential = {
		nor = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		or = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_energy_converter_add = @b1_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_energy_converter_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b4_minerals
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_cost
			rare_crystals = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b3_upkeep
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 6791
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }

		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }

		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {

	}

# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:400.0 roi2250:2880600.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep
building_giga_equatorial_factory = {
	category = resource
	can_build = no
	icon = unused/building_carrion_processor_2

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
			alloys = 2
		}
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		district_giga_planet_alloys_artisan_replacement = 100 # any value > 0 activates the effect
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		job_maintenance_drone_add = 400
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5138
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		consumer_goods = 4
	}
}

# object = building:esc_building_reprocessing_plant; source = Extra Ship Components NEXT::common\buildings\esc_buildings_resources.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:consumer_goods_repair jobs:200.0 roi2250:1450880.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep
esc_building_reprocessing_plant = {
	base_buildtime = 360
	planet_limit = 1
	icon = esc_building_reprocessing_plant
	category = manufacturing

	building_sets = {
		industrial
		urban
	}

	potential = {
		NOT = { has_modifier = resort_colony }
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
		NOT = { has_global_flag = ESC_GLOBAL_FLAG_scrapper_tech_forbidden }
		exists = owner
		owner = { has_country_flag = scrapper_killed }
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	resources = {
        category = planet_buildings
        cost = {
			minerals = 400
			rare_crystals = 10
			exotic_gases = 10
        }
        upkeep = {
			energy = 3
        }
	}

	# regular empires
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_pops_consumer_goods_upkeep_mult = -0.1
			pop_amenities_usage_mult = -0.1
			job_esc_reprocessor_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_esc_reprocessor_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_effect_desc
	}

	# gestalt empires
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			pop_amenities_usage_no_happiness_mult = -0.2
			job_esc_reprocessor_drone_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_esc_reprocessor_drone_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = {
				is_gestalt = yes
				NOT = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
			}
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_drone_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
        }
        text = job_esc_reprocessor_drone_rs_effect_desc
	}

	prerequisites = { "esc_tech_reprocessing_plant" }

	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 3448
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { country_uses_consumer_goods = yes NOT = { staid_consumer_goods_runway_safe = yes } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 4
		consumer_goods = 2
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_pcc_scrap_pile; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:alloy_scaling jobs:1600.0 roi2250:11534400.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs
building_giga_pcc_scrap_pile = {
	category = resource
	can_build = no
	icon = building_junkheap

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		job_miner_add = 600
		job_foundry_add = 200
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		job_mining_drone_add = 600
		job_fabricator_add = 200
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 14919
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = alloys value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 16
	}
}

# object = building:building_cyberdome; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\20_machine_age_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:alloy_scaling jobs:1400.0 roi2250:10097100.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_cyberdome = { # Cyber Imperial Collectivist
	base_buildtime = @b3_time
	planet_limit = 1

	desc = {
		text = building_cyberdome_desc
	}

	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
	}

	potential = {
		owner = {
			is_imperial_authority = yes
			has_country_flag = cyber_collectivist
		}
		is_capital = yes
	}

	allow = {

	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					is_imperial_authority = no
				}
			}
			AND = {
				exists = planet
				planet = {
					is_capital = no
				}
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_cyberdome_spectator_add = 200
		planet_entertainers_unity_produces_add = 0.5
		planet_entertainers_alloys_upkeep_add = 0.25
	}

	# With edict
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_edict = neurocasted_spectacles
			}
		}
		planet_housing_add = 5000
		planet_resettlement_unemployed_destination_mult = 0.25
		planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.1
		job_cyberdome_duelist_add = 200
		job_cyberdome_spectator_add = 1000
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = alloys
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 3
		}
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 13301
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = alloys value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 14
		unity = 1
	}
}

# object = building:building_ehof_sm_forge_2; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:alloy_scaling jobs:1200.0 roi2250:8655500.0 flags:has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_ehof_sm_forge_2 = {
	base_buildtime = @b4_time
	can_build = no
	category = manufacturing
	prerequisites = { tech_ehof_sentient_tier_3 }

	allow = {
		has_major_upgraded_capital = yes
		NOR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}
	building_sets = {
		urban
		industrial
		foundry
        giga_sentient_metal
	}
	destroy_trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_cultivation_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_cultivation_drone_add = @b2_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_cultivator_add = @b2_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivation_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivation_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivator_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = { minerals = @b4_minerals }
		upkeep = { energy = @b4_upkeep }
	}

	ai_weight = { weight = 1000 }


	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 11681
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = alloys value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 12
		giga_sr_sentient_metal = 1
	}
}

# object = building:building_mineral_purification_hub; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\03_resource_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:alloy_scaling jobs:800.0 roi2250:5766050.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_mineral_purification_hub = {
	desc = {
		trigger = { NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable } }
		text = building_mineral_purification_hub_desc
	}

	desc = {
		trigger = { is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable }
		text = building_scrap_processing_hub_desc
	}

	base_buildtime = @b2_time
	can_build = no
	category = resource

	building_sets = {
		mining
		harvest
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_wilderness_empire = no } # see 'building_churning_tunnels_4'
		OR = {
			owner = { is_ai = no }
			has_any_mining_district_or_building = yes
			owner = { is_nomadic = yes }
		}
	}
	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
		NOT = { has_modifier = resort_colony }
	}
	destroy_trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_ai = yes }
				has_any_mining_district_or_building = no
			}
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher_with_additional_trigger
			TRIGGER = "has_ringworld_output_boost = no"
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = volatile_motes
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				has_ringworld_output_boost = no
			}
			volatile_motes = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher_with_additional_trigger
			TRIGGER = "has_ringworld_output_boost = yes"
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = volatile_motes
			COST = 900
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				has_ringworld_output_boost = yes
			}
			volatile_motes = 200
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				has_ringworld_output_boost = no
			}
			energy = 2
			volatile_motes = @b2_rare_upkeep
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				has_ringworld_output_boost = yes
			}
			energy = 5
			volatile_motes = 3
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = { is_nomadic = no }
			NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_miners_minerals_produces_add = 1.0
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = { is_nomadic = no }
			is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_miners_minerals_produces_add = 0.5
			planet_miners_alloys_produces_add = 0.2
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = { is_nomadic = no }
			has_ringworld_output_boost = yes
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_miners_minerals_produces_add = 0.5
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = {
				is_nomadic = yes
				is_gestalt = no
			}
		}
		job_ark_harvester_add = @building_static_jobs_high
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = {
				is_nomadic = yes
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_ark_harvester_gestalt_add = @building_static_jobs_high
	}

	prerequisites = {
		tech_mineral_purification_2
	}



	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		is_wilderness_empire = no
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 8428
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = alloys value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 1
		energy = 15
		minerals = 22
	}
}

# object = building:building_ehof_sm_forge_1; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:alloy_scaling jobs:600.0 roi2250:4336520.0 flags:has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_ehof_sm_forge_1 = {
	base_buildtime = @b3_time
	category = manufacturing
	upgrades = { building_ehof_sm_forge_2 }
	prerequisites = { tech_ehof_sentient_tier_1 }

	potential = {
		NOR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}
	building_sets = {
		urban
		industrial
		foundry
        giga_sentient_metal
	}
	destroy_trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			has_modifier = slave_colony
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }		modifier = { job_ehof_cultivation_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_cultivation_drone_add = @b1_jobs } }
	triggered_planet_modifier = { potential = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	modifier = { job_ehof_cultivator_add = @b1_jobs } }

	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_hive_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivation_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_machine_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivation_drone_effect_desc }
	triggered_desc = { trigger = { exists = owner owner = { is_regular_empire = yes } }	text = job_ehof_cultivator_effect_desc }

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = { minerals = @b3_minerals }
		upkeep = { energy = @b3_upkeep }
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 50
			NOR = {
				has_building = building_ehof_sm_forge_1
				has_building = building_ehof_sm_forge_2
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 50
			owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = giga_sr_sentient_metal value < 50 } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 50
			owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = giga_sr_sentient_metal value < 1 } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 50
			has_building = building_ehof_sm_forge_1
			free_building_slots = 0
		}
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = alloys value < 500 } } }
	}


	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 6791

	ai_resource_production = {
		alloys = 6
		giga_sr_sentient_metal = 1
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_gas_giant_habitation_module; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:energy_scaling jobs:6300.0 roi2250:45387900.0 flags:ai_weight_zero_or_gated_zero|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_giga_gas_giant_habitation_module = {
	category = resource
	icon = building_bio_reprocessing_facilities
	can_build = no
	base_cap_amount = 1

	destroy_trigger = {
		always = no # no point in destroying
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		upkeep = {
			energy = 3
		}
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
	}

	# non-lithoid non-gestalts : 3 technicians, 2 miners, 5 farmers
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = no
				is_lithoid_empire = no
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_add = 300
			job_miner_add = 200
			job_farmer_add = 500
		}
	}
	# lithoid non-gestalts : 3 technicians, 6 miners
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_gestalt = no
				is_lithoid_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_add = 300
			job_miner_add = 600
		}
	}
	# non-lithoid bio hives : 5 technician drones, 2 mining drones, 6 agri-drones
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_hive_empire = yes
				is_lithoid_empire = no
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = 500
			job_mining_drone_add = 200
			job_agri_drone_add = 600
		}
	}
	# lithoid bio hives : 5 technician drones, 8 mining-drones
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_hive_empire = yes
				is_lithoid_empire = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = 500
			job_mining_drone_add = 800
		}
	}
	# machine emipiers (normal) : 6 technician drones, 2 mining drones
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_machine_empire = yes
				NOR = {
					has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator
					has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = 600
			job_mining_drone_add = 200
		}
	}
	# machine emipiers (RS/DA) : 6 technician drones, 2 mining drones, 2 agri-drones
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_machine_empire = yes
				OR = {
					has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator
					has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = 600
			job_mining_drone_add = 200
			job_agri_drone_add = 200
		}
	}

	# amenities (non-gestalts)
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_add = 1000
		}
	}
	# amenities (gestalts)
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_no_happiness_add = 1000
		}
	}

	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		text = job_technician_drone_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		text = job_mining_drone_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes is_lithoid_empire = no }
		}
		text = job_agri_drone_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		text = job_miner_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		text = job_technician_effect_desc
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no is_lithoid_empire = no }
		}
		text = job_farmer_effect_desc
	}

	ai_weight = { weight = 0 }

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 31
	additional_ai_weight = 15000
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 63
	}
}

		script = buildings/matrioshka_uplinks/building_giga_matrioshka_brain_uplink
		name = sanctuary
		category = unity
		resources = "
			cost = {
				exotic_gases = 500

				exotic_gases = 4
			}

		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }

# object = building:building_giga_paluush_homes; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions

	capital = no
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no
	ai_weight = { weight = 0 }
	category = amenity
	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = yes
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		always = no
	}
	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}
	planet_modifier = {
		planet_amenities_add = 100
		planet_housing_add = 500
		planet_crime_add = -20
		job_primitive_farmer_add = 200
		job_primitive_technician_add = 100
		job_primitive_miner_add = 100
		job_telepath_add = 100
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5968
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

		energy = 5
	}

# object = building:building_mineral_purification_plant; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\03_resource_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:energy_scaling jobs:400.0 roi2250:2899500.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_mineral_purification_plant = {
	desc = {
		trigger = {
			NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable }
		}
		text = building_mineral_purification_plant_desc
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = { is_planet_class = pc_shattered_ring_habitable }
		text = building_scrap_processing_plant_desc
	}

	base_buildtime = @b1_time
	planet_limit = 1
	category = resource

	building_sets = {
		mining
		harvest
	}

	potential = {
		owner = { is_wilderness_empire = no } # see 'building_churning_tunnels_3'
		NOR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			is_planet_class = pc_ringworld_habitable
			is_planet_class = pc_cybrex
		}
		OR = {
			NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_habitat }
			AND = {
				is_planet_class = pc_habitat
				check_modifier_value = {
					modifier = district_hab_mining_max_add
					value > 0
				}
			}
		}
		OR = {
			has_carrier_flag = ignore_ai_building_limitations
			owner = { is_ai = no }
			has_any_mining_district_or_building = yes
			owner = { is_nomadic = yes }
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		OR = {
			has_modifier = resort_colony
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_ai = yes }
				has_any_mining_district_or_building = no
			}
			AND = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { is_wilderness_empire = yes }
			}
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = volatile_motes
			COST = 200
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = { is_nomadic = no }
		}
		planet_miners_minerals_produces_add = 0.5
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = {
				is_nomadic = yes
				is_gestalt = no
			}
		}
		job_ark_harvester_add = @building_static_jobs
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner = {
				is_nomadic = yes
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_ark_harvester_gestalt_add = @building_static_jobs
	}

	upgrades = {
		building_mineral_purification_hub
	}

	prerequisites = {
		tech_mineral_purification_1
	}



	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		is_wilderness_empire = no
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5139
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		minerals = 15
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_flusion_fusion_power_plant; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_flusion_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:energy_scaling jobs:400.0 roi2250:2894700.0 flags:ai_weight_zero_or_gated_zero|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs|uses_inline_script
building_giga_flusion_fusion_power_plant = {
	capital = no
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = yes
	ai_weight = { weight = 0 }
	base_buildtime = 360
	category = resource

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		produces = {
			energy = 25
		}
	}
	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
        generator
	}
	destroy_trigger = {
		always = no
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = no }
		}
		job_technician_add = 200
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		job_technician_drone_add = 200
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5138
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 25
	}
}

# object = building:esc_building_stellar_energy_tower; source = Extra Ship Components NEXT::common\buildings\esc_buildings_general.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:energy_scaling jobs:300.0 roi2250:2175190.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|uses_inline_script
esc_building_stellar_energy_tower = {
	base_buildtime = 360
	planet_limit = 1
	icon = esc_building_stellar_energy_tower
	category = resource

	building_sets = {
		farming
		generator
	}

	potential = {
		NOT = { has_modifier = resort_colony }
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
		NOT = { has_global_flag = ESC_GLOBAL_FLAG_stellarite_tech_forbidden }
		exists = owner
		owner = { has_country_flag = ESC_COUNTRY_FLAG_killed_stellarite_devourer }
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = 600
			rare_crystals = 25
			exotic_gases = 25
		}
		produces = {
			energy = 10
			unity = 3
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_jobs_food_produces_mult = 0.15
	}

	# research jobs
	inline_script = {
		script = jobs/researchers_add
		AMOUNT = @ESC_job_count_1
	}

	# regular empire
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_technician_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		text = esc_stellar_tower_effect_regular
	}

	# hive mind
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_hive_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_technician_drone_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_hive_empire = yes }
		}
		text = esc_stellar_tower_effect_hive
	}

	# machine empires
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_machine_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_technician_drone_add = @ESC_job_count_1
			job_technician_drone_per_pop = 0.05
		}
	}
	triggered_desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_machine_empire = yes }
		}
		text = esc_stellar_tower_effect_machine
	}

	show_tech_unlock_if = { NOT = { has_global_flag = ESC_GLOBAL_FLAG_stellarite_tech_forbidden } }
	prerequisites = { "esc_tech_stellar_energy_tower" }
	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 4301
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		food = 1
		unity = 3
	}
}

# object = building:building_waste_reprocessing_center; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\12_event_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:energy_scaling jobs:200.0 roi2250:1454400.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_jobs|uses_inline_script
building_waste_reprocessing_center = {
	icon = building_waste_reprocessing_center
	base_buildtime = @b2_time
	planet_limit = 1
	can_build = yes
	can_demolish = yes

	category = resource

	building_sets = {
		urban
		generator
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			has_country_flag = bought_waste_reprocessing_center
		}
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_gestalt = no
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_amenities_add = 500
		job_technician_drone_add = 200
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = volatile_motes
			COST = 100
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		produces = {
			minerals = 10
			energy = 10
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				owner = { is_wilderness_empire = yes }
			}
			biomass = @b2_biomass
		}
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_wilderness_buildings_districts
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 25
	additional_ai_weight = 3449
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
		modifier = { factor = 8 owner = { has_monthly_income = { resource = energy value < 500 } } }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		minerals = 10
	}
}

	}

	building_sets = {

	}

			exists = owner

		}

		}
	}

		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }

		}

	}

		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }

		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }

		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }

# object = building:gpm_building_ascension_tower; source = Guilli's Planet Modifiers and Features::common\buildings\gpm_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:6000.0 roi2250:43213980.0 flags:ai_weight_zero_or_gated_zero|has_ai_or_direct_output|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep
gpm_building_ascension_tower = {
	base_buildtime = @b3_time
	planet_limit = 1

	building_sets = {
		unity
	}

	category = amenity

	potential = {
		NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_habitat }
		exists = owner
		# owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
	}

	allow = {
		has_upgraded_capital = yes
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_jobs_unity_produces_mult = 0.10
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			NOT = { owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor } }
		}
		planet_amenities_add = 4000
		planet_housing_add = 8000
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_valid_civic = civic_machine_servitor }
		}
		planet_amenities_add = 3000
		planet_housing_add = 6000
		job_bio_trophy_add = 6000
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_active_tradition = tr_domination_imperious_architecture
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 2000
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		produces = {
			trigger = { exists = owner }
			unity = 1
			multiplier = owner.trigger:num_ascension_perks
		}
		cost = {
			minerals = 1200
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
		}
	}

	prerequisites = {
		tech_gpm_supermaterials_precursor
	}

	triggered_desc = {
		text = building_autochthon_monument_effect
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
		modifier = {
			weight = 10000 #High weight to gurantee that if the below is true then the AI should build it
			free_housing < 5 #Prevents the AI from running out of residences when nearly out of tiles
			NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_habitat }
		}
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 31
	additional_ai_weight = 15000

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 60
		minerals = 60
		unity = 1
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_matrioshka_brain_uplink_hell; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_matrioshka_brain_uplinks.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions

building_giga_matrioshka_brain_uplink_hell = {

		script = buildings/matrioshka_uplinks/building_giga_matrioshka_brain_uplink
		name = hell
		category = government
		resources = "
			cost = {
				volatile_motes = 500
			}
			upkeep = {
				volatile_motes = 4
			}
		"
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		job_giga_virtual_hell_inmate_add = 2000
	}

    # replace the auto-generated tooltip because it doesn't cover everything properly
    auto_generate_description = no
    triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = {
                is_twisted_experimenters_empire = no
            }
        }
        text = job_giga_virtual_hell_inmate_effect_desc
    }
    triggered_desc = {
        trigger = {
            exists = owner
            owner = {
                is_twisted_experimenters_empire = yes
            }
        }
        text = job_giga_virtual_hell_inmate_effect_desc_twisted
    }
	ai_weight_coefficient = 29
	additional_ai_weight = 15000
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }

		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 20
		minerals = 20
	}

# object = building:building_giga_interstellar_hydroponic_farm; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:1600.0 roi2250:11526600.0 flags:ai_weight_zero_or_gated_zero|has_jobs|has_upkeep
building_giga_interstellar_hydroponic_farm = {
	category = resource
	icon = building_hydroponics_farm
	can_build = no
	base_cap_amount = 1 # for fancy background

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		OR = {
			owner = {
				is_ai = yes
				country_uses_food = no
			}
			planet = {
				free_building_slots = 0
				owner = {
					is_ai = yes
					has_monthly_income = {
						resource = food
						value > 100
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_farmer_add = 600
		}
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_hive_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_agri_drone_add = 700
		}
	}
	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_machine_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_agri_drone_add = 300
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
		}
	}

	ai_weight = { weight = 0 }
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 14919
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 16
		minerals = 16
	}

	category = resource

	can_build = no
	base_cap_amount = 1

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		planet = {
			free_building_slots = 0
			owner = {
				is_ai = yes
				has_monthly_income = {
					resource = minerals
					value > 100
				}
			}
		}
	}

	building_sets = {
		urban
		government
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_matter_synthesizer_add = 600
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = no }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_matter_synthesizer_drone_add = 600
		}
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 28
	additional_ai_weight = 11681
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 12
		minerals = 12
	}
}

# object = building:building_junkheap; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\12_event_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:1000.0 roi2250:7210800.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs
building_junkheap = {
	capital = yes
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no
	can_be_disabled = no
	position_priority = 0
	capital_tier = 1

	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_country_type = ratlings }
		NOT = { has_modifier = slave_colony }
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_machine_capital
		building_capital
		building_hive_capital
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = 1500
		planet_amenities_add = 2000
		job_ratling_scavenger_add = 1000
	}

	upgrades = {
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 10057
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		minerals = 10
	}
}

# object = building:building_solarpunk_gaiaseeder; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\11_primitive_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:1000.0 roi2250:7202860.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep
building_solarpunk_gaiaseeder = {
	icon = building_gaiaseeders_4
	base_buildtime = @b1_time
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no

	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = yes
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = no
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_solarpunk_anarchist_add = 1000
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b1_minerals
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep
		}
	}

	prerequisites = {
	}

	upgrades = {
	}

	on_destroy = {

	}

	on_repaired = {

	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 10057
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		minerals = 10
	}
}

# object = building:building_necrophage_house_of_apotheosis; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\01_pop_assembly_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:1000.0 roi2250:7197100.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_build_cost|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_necrophage_house_of_apotheosis = {
	icon = building_chamber_of_elevation_2
	base_buildtime = @b3_time
	can_build = no
	position_priority = 100

	category = pop_assembly

	building_sets = {
		government
		urban
	}

	desc = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { exists = owner }
				owner = { is_hive_empire = no }
			}
		}
		text = building_necrophage_house_of_apotheosis_desc
	}
	desc = {
		trigger = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_hive_empire = yes }
		}
		text = building_necrophage_house_of_apotheosis_desc_hive
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			has_origin = origin_necrophage
			has_trait = trait_necrophage
			NOR = {
				has_valid_civic = civic_fanatic_purifiers
				has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm
			}
			is_ai = no #the AI will just kill all its necrophytes
		}
	}

	allow = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					owner = { is_ai = yes }
				}
				any_owned_species = {
					species_can_be_necrophaged = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		OR = {
			owner = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_origin = origin_necrophage }
					NOT = { has_trait = trait_necrophage }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				owner = { is_ai = yes }
				NOT = {
					any_owned_species = {
						species_can_be_necrophaged = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_necro_apprentice_add = 600
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			is_planet_class = pc_hive
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_hive_empire = yes }
		}
		job_necro_apprentice_add = 400
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = rare_crystals
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		cost = {
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b2_upkeep
			exotic_gases = @b2_rare_upkeep
		}
	}

	prerequisites = {
		tech_glandular_acclimation
	}

	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		has_origin = origin_necrophage
		has_trait = trait_necrophage
	}

	triggered_desc = {
		text = disables_necrophage_growth
	}

	triggered_desc = {
		text = necrophage_elevation_timer_tooltip
		trigger = {
			has_carrier_flag = necrophage_elevation_timer
		}
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 10057
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 10
		minerals = 10
	}
}

building_ancient_control_center = {
	base_buildtime = @b3_time
	capital = yes
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = yes
	position_priority = 0
	capital_tier = 5

	icon = building_maintenance_depot

	category = government

	building_sets = {
		fallen_empire
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_fallen_empire_machine = yes
		}
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_hive_major_capital
		building_machine_major_capital
		building_major_capital
		building_major_capital_wilderness
		building_ancient_palace
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = 1200
		planet_amenities_add = 15000
		job_fe_maintenance_bot_add = 400
		job_fe_guardian_bot_add = 500
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = alloys
			COST = @b2_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 10
		}
	}

	upgrades = {
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 9244
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 9
		minerals = 9
	}
}

		script = buildings/matrioshka_uplinks/building_giga_matrioshka_brain_uplink
		name = anti_deviancy
		category = government
		resources = "
			cost = {
				volatile_motes = 500
			}
			upkeep = {
				volatile_motes = 2
			}
		"
	}

	planet_modifier = {
        enforcer_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.4
	}
    triggered_planet_modifier = {
        planet_jobs_produces_mult = 0.1
        job_patrol_drone_add = 800
    }
	ai_weight_coefficient = 27
	additional_ai_weight = 8428
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }

		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }

# object = building:building_deployment_post; source = Stellaris vanilla::common\buildings\00_capital_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions
# staid_dataset_job_pressure = family:general_job_pressure jobs:500.0 roi2250:3621300.0 flags:ai_weight_absent|has_jobs|has_upkeep|uses_inline_script
building_deployment_post = {
	capital = yes
	can_build = no
	can_demolish = no
	can_be_ruined = no
	can_be_disabled = no
	position_priority = 0
	capital_tier = 1

	category = government

	building_sets = {
		government
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			OR = {
				is_machine_empire = yes
				is_country_type = ai_empire
			}
			is_fallen_empire = no
		}
		uses_habitat_capitals = no
		NOT = { is_planet_class = pc_cosmogenesis_world }
	}

	convert_to = {
		building_hive_capital
		building_colony_shelter
		building_ancient_control_center
		building_ancient_palace
		building_colony_shelter_wilderness
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = 300
		planet_amenities_add = 500
		job_replicator_add = 200
		job_patrol_drone_add = 100
		job_logistics_drone_add = 200
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = buildings/on_all_capital_buildings
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_civic = civic_machine_assimilator }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_replicator_add = -100
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_modifier = shroud_forged_physician_modifier }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_physician_drone_add = 100
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		upkeep = {
			energy = 1
		}
	}

	upgrades = {
		building_machine_capital
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5968
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 5
		minerals = 5
	}
}

		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }

building_solarpunk_ranger_lodge = {
	icon = building_paradise_dome
	base_buildtime = @b1_time

	can_demolish = yes
	can_be_ruined = no

	category = amenity

	building_sets = {
		pre_ftl
	}

	potential = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = yes
		}
	}

	destroy_trigger = {
		exists = owner
		owner = {
			is_primitive = no
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_solarpunk_anarchist_add = 500
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		inline_script = {
			script = buildings/nomadic_cost_switcher
			REGULAR_RESOURCE = minerals
			NOMADIC_RESOURCE = alloys
			COST = @b1_minerals
			NOMADIC_COST_MULT = @nomadic_minerals_to_strategic_ratio
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = @b1_upkeep

	}

	}

	on_repaired = {

	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5967
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 3 years_passed > 79 }
		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
	}

	ai_resource_production = {
		energy = 5
		minerals = 5
	}
}

# object = building:building_giga_fe_stronghold; source = Gigastructural Engineering & More (4.4)::common\buildings\giga_fallen_empire_buildings.txt; consumer_policy = conditional:gated_scorable_with_conditions

building_giga_fe_stronghold = {
	base_buildtime = @b2_time
	can_build = no
	icon = building_fortress

	category = army

	building_sets = {
		fallen_empire
	}

		exists = owner
		owner = { is_fallen_empire = yes has_country_flag = giga_meopa_fe }

		building_fortress
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		job_giga_fe_protector_add = 500
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_buildings
		cost = {
			minerals = @b2_minerals
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 10
		}
	}
	ai_weight_coefficient = 26
	additional_ai_weight = 5967
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 1
		modifier = { factor = 30 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 1 }
		modifier = { factor = 18 num_unemployed > 0 free_jobs < 3 }
		modifier = { factor = 16 owner = { staid_construction_spenddown_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 14 owner = { staid_core_deficit_short_runway = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 18 owner = { staid_high_scale_snowball_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 10 owner = { staid_aggressive_fleet_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_planetary_capacity_growth_ready = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_surplus_sink_pressure = yes } }
		modifier = { factor = 6 owner = { staid_resource_waste_pressure = yes } }

		modifier = { factor = 5 years_passed > 119 }
